One dollar and eighty-seven cents was all the money that Della had saved. That was everything she had after saving for months. Della counted her money again, but it was still only one dollar and eighty-seven cents. She wanted to buy Jim a special Christmas gift. Christmas was coming tomorrow, and she felt desperate about the money situation. She sat down on her old couch and started crying softly. She loved Jim very much and wanted to make him happy. He worked hard every day at his office job. She desperately wanted to find something special and meaningful for him. But she had no money left after paying all their bills. She walked to the mirror and looked at her reflection carefully. Her beautiful hair was very long and reached her waist gracefully. It was thick, shiny brown hair that everyone always admired. Suddenly she had a brilliant idea about selling her precious hair. She knew that women sometimes sold their hair to make money. She quickly put on her winter coat and rushed outside. She hurried down the street until she found a shop that bought hair. The woman in the shop examined her hair and bought it immediately. Della received twenty dollars for her beautiful hair, which was enough money. Now she finally had enough money to buy Jim's Christmas present. She felt both happy and sad about losing her beautiful hair. Her lovely hair was completely gone, and she looked very different without it. She went shopping to find the perfect gift for her husband. She discovered a beautiful platinum watch chain in an elegant jewelry store. It was absolutely perfect for Jim's precious gold pocket watch that he treasured. Jim loved his grandfather's gold watch more than anything else he owned. The expensive chain cost exactly twenty dollars, which was all her money. She bought the beautiful chain for Jim without any hesitation. She returned home with the special gift and felt nervous about Jim's reaction. She was very worried about how Jim would react to her short hair. What would Jim think when he saw her completely different appearance? She prepared their dinner carefully and waited anxiously for him to come home. Jim came home from work and stopped suddenly when he saw her. He looked at Della with a strange, surprised expression on his face. He immediately noticed her short hair and seemed shocked by the dramatic change. He was completely surprised and couldn't believe what he was seeing. Della nervously explained why she had sold her precious hair for money. She proudly showed him the beautiful platinum watch chain she had bought. Jim looked at her with a sad but loving smile on his face. He told her that he also had a special surprise for her. He had sold his precious watch earlier that day to buy something special. He had bought beautiful decorative combs for her long, lovely hair. The expensive combs were specifically designed for her beautiful long hair that was now gone. Now both of their thoughtful gifts were completely useless to each other. But they realized that they loved each other more than ever before. The gifts had shown their true, deep love and sacrifice for each other. They were truly the wisest and most loving people in the world.
